---
title: "01 Baseline Analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Baseline Analysis

**Summary**: read in V1, V2, and V3 of the Washington State EHD map and calculate a Population Burden Gap (PBG) for people of color for each version. Then, calculate a ΔPBG between V1 and V2, and V2 and V3. This is the native PBG and ΔPBG calculation our sensitivty analysis PBG and ΔPBG values will be compared to.

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

#Load Libraries (install if needed)
pkgs <- c("tidyverse", "sf", "arcgislayers")

for (p in pkgs) {
  if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(p)
  }
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(
    library(p, character.only = TRUE)
  )
}
```

```{r}
#Load custom functions
source("../R/compute_pbg.R")
source("../R/compute_delta_pbg.R")
source("../R/helpers.R")
```

```{r}
#Load data (EHD map V1, V2, and V3)

```

```{r}
#Calculate PBG
```

```{r}
#Calculate ΔPBG
```

```{r}
#Data Table + Chart
```
